CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2010 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-01-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4 (Administrative Fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Fee was paid. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Shari D. Marks, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Hanmi Bank, a California banking corporation.
Joseph Woo, Special Asset Officer for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Pleasanton Sushi & Seafood Buffet, Inc., a California corporation, dba Todai Restaurant, Choo Cheon Chang, a/k/a Peter Chang, an individual or Deep Sea Corporation, a California corporation.
Defaults were entered against these defendants on July 15, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 26, 2009.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Young Ok Park, an individual was filed on July 14, 2009.
Summary Judgment Order was entered against defendant Ralph Kim, an indivdivual on November 9, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Hanmi Bank, a California banking corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Pleasanton Sushi & Seafoof Buffet, Inc., a California corporation, dba Todai Restaurant, Choo Cheon Chang, a/k/a Peter Chang, an individual, or Deep Sea Corporation, a California corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $556,953.22.
Prejudgment Interest - $51,166.25.
Late Charges - $5,114.72.
Attorney's Fees - $14,587.88.
Costs - $777.20, for a total judgment in the amount of $628,599.27.

Additionally, it is further Ordered that plaintiff Hanmi Bank, a California banking corporation, recover for defendants Pleasanton Sushi & Seafood Buffet, Inc., a California corporation, dba Todai Restaurant, and Deep Sea Corporation, a California corporation, a Judgment for Claim for Delivery, and for possession of the personal property described on pages two and three of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF HANMI BANK, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT RALPH KIM. Appearances: Shari Marks, Esq. of Frandzel Robins Bloom & Csato L.C. (323) 852-1000 appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order & Judgment signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
